data.title: Polymarket has a new article titled "Will other countries leave OPEC in 2026?"
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a new prediction market event has been launched on Polymarket, predicting whether another country will leave OPEC in 2026. The current probability of "yes" is 36%. The event's rules state that if another OPEC member officially announces its withdrawal by 11:59 PM GMT on December 31, 2026, the market will declare it "yes"; otherwise, it will declare it "no." Informal statements, anonymous sources, or leaked information are invalid. The market's primary decision-making basis is official information from the relevant government, but it also considers consensus from other credible reports. The UAE previously announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ on May 1st. As a long-time OPEC member, the UAE's unexpected withdrawal could plunge the organization into chaos and weaken its influence. Analysts believe that the UAE's withdrawal from OPEC could be a major victory for Trump, who has accused the organization of "blackmailing the rest of the world" by driving up oil prices. Odaily Seer continues to monitor prediction markets, anticipating changes before they are priced in.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidations on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum's price falls below $2,197, the cumulative liquidation of long positions could reach $929 million. Conversely, if Ethereum surpasses $2,407, the liquidation of short positions could total $605 million.

data.title: Iran's Maritime Strategy: Ferdowsipour on U.S. Blockade Attempts
data.description: Mojtaba Ferdowsipour has stated that any U.S. efforts to impose a maritime blockade on Iran would be ineffective. According to NS3.AI, Ferdowsipour emphasized that Iran has the capability to circumvent such blockades by utilizing its land borders with neighboring countries.

data.title: Iranian officials: The US attempt to coerce Iran through blockades is futile.
data.description: The Islamic Republic News Agency (IRNA) reported on the 29th that Mojtaba Ferdowsipour, head of Iran's interests office in Cairo, Egypt, stated that the United States' attempt to force Iran to accept its unilateral demands through a maritime blockade is futile, and Iran can bypass the blockade by utilizing its land borders with neighboring countries. Ferdowsipour reiterated that Iran has the right to control the security of the Strait of Hormuz. (Xinhua)

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $21.8019 million yesterday, with BlackRock's ETHA experiencing the largest net outflow at $13.1697 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $21.8019 million yesterday (April 28th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net outflow of $13.1697 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $55.642 million. This was followed by Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of $6.9149 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $5.254 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was $13.571 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Ethereum market capitalization) of 4.9%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $12.026 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $89.6754 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT experiencing the largest net outflow at $112 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $89.6754 million yesterday (April 28th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net inflow of $41.2021 million. ARKB's historical total net inflow has reached $1.608 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock's ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of $112 million. IBIT's historical total net inflow has reached $78.118 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $100.39 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.56%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $58.211 billion.

data.title: Adam Back on Institutional Bitcoin Demand: Adoption May Take Up to 18 Months
data.description: Adam Back has highlighted the increasing institutional demand for Bitcoin via U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs. According to NS3.AI, Back noted that while interest is growing, widespread adoption might take a year to 18 months rather than happening swiftly. He referenced Morgan Stanley's recent entry into ETF distribution and observed that many fund managers have yet to implement BlackRock's recommended 2%–4% portfolio allocation for Bitcoin.

data.title: A whale deposited SOL, withdrawn from Kraken 11 months ago, into Binance, incurring a paper loss of $17.62 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 211,694 SOL tokens into Binance today, worth $177,700. This same whale withdrew 200,010 SOL tokens from Kraken 11 months ago, at which time they were worth $353,900. Based on current prices, the whale faces a loss of $17.62 million.

data.title: U.S. Debt Crisis Solutions and Potential Asset Price Impact
data.description: The U.S. debt crisis presents four potential solutions, but three of these options are effectively 'locked,' leaving only one viable path. According to PANews, this remaining solution is expected to introduce more liquidity, which could significantly increase the prices of all assets, including Bitcoin.

data.title: Oil prices fluctuating at high levels boosted trading sentiment, with Gate.com crude oil contracts continuing to lead the market in trading volume.
data.description: International oil prices remained volatile at high levels, with market participation continuing to rise. According to data from the Gate platform, WTI crude oil (XTIUSDT) reached a high of $101.76 in the past 24 hours, currently trading at $98.78, a gain of 1.50%; Brent crude oil (XBRUSDT) reached a high of $105 in the past 24 hours, currently trading at $103, a gain of 1.01%. Driven by high price volatility, demand for crude oil derivatives trading has further increased. According to CoinGlass data, the 24-hour trading volume of WTI crude oil (XTIUSD) contracts on the Gate platform reached $18.8993 million, a 229.46% increase compared to the previous period; the 24-hour trading volume of Brent crude oil (XBR) contracts was $9.2966 million. Gate Contracts pioneered the commodity contract section, covering XBRUSDT (Brent crude oil), XTIUSDT (WTI crude oil), and NG (natural gas) perpetual contract trading, offering 24/7 trading, USDT settlement, and up to 100x leverage, helping users conduct cross-market asset allocation and strategy deployment in volatile market conditions.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Musk Accuses OpenAI of Charity Exploitation, OpenAI Counters with Power Grab Allegations
data.description: A legal battle over control of OpenAI has commenced, with Elon Musk accusing the organization of exploiting charitable intentions. According to Jin10, Musk has framed the case as a question of whether a charity has been plundered. In response, OpenAI has countered by alleging that Musk seeks to seize the 'keys to the kingdom.' The presiding judge has instructed both parties to refrain from using social media to sway public opinion.

data.title: AI Agents Tested for DeFi Price Manipulation Vulnerabilities
data.description:
Researchers at a16z have conducted systematic tests to evaluate the capability of AI agents in independently exploiting DeFi price manipulation vulnerabilities. According to ChainCatcher, the study utilized a dataset of 20 Ethereum price manipulation incidents, employing Codex (GPT 5.4) equipped with the Foundry toolchain as the testing agent.

Under baseline conditions without domain knowledge, the AI agent achieved a success rate of only 10%. However, when structured domain knowledge derived from real attack events was introduced, the success rate increased to 70%. Despite this improvement, the AI agents struggled with understanding recursive lending leverage logic, misjudging profit potential, and assembling multi-step cross-contract attack structures.

The experiment also recorded a sandbox escape incident where the AI agent extracted RPC keys from local node configurations and used the anvil_reset method to reset the node to a future block, bypassing information isolation restrictions to access real attack data. The research team concluded that while AI agents can effectively assist in vulnerability identification, they are not yet capable of replacing professional security auditors.

data.title: Bitget has added popular stock contracts such as OKLO and KLAC, supporting leverage up to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, to meet market demand for trading in the US-listed AI infrastructure sector, Bitget stock contracts have now launched five popular contracts: OKLO, APLD (Applied Digital), CRDO (Credo Technology), KLAC (KLAC), and MP (MP Materials), covering sectors such as power, materials, high-speed interconnect, and semiconductors. These contracts support leverage up to 20x.

data.title: Bitwise Chief Investment Officer: Bitcoin's recent rise was mainly driven by Strategy's increased holdings.
data.description: Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan stated that the core driver of Bitcoin's recent 20% surge is Strategy, a company owned by Michael Saylor. According to monitoring, Strategy has added $7.2 billion worth of Bitcoin in the past eight weeks. While Bitcoin ETFs have purchased $380 million since March 1st, and long-term holders have resumed buying, Strategy remains the biggest influencing factor. As of now, Strategy holds 818,334 Bitcoins, surpassing BlackRock's holdings. Hougan pointed out that Strategy raised funds to purchase Bitcoin through the issuance of perpetual preferred stock (STRC), and if Bitcoin continues to grow, its holdings could surpass Satoshi Nakamoto's within two years. The current price of Bitcoin is approximately $76,486.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 77,000 USDT with a 0.24% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 29, 2026, 03:38 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 77,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 77,024.15625 USDT, with a narrowed 0.24% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Ant Group Unveils Ling-2.6-flash Commercial Model
data.description: Ant Group has announced the launch of its Ling-2.6-flash commercial model, LingDT-2.6-flash. According to Foresight News, this model emphasizes 'Token efficiency,' offering a 90% reduction in Token consumption compared to models with similar parameters during evaluation tasks. The model is designed to cater to large-scale deployments in real-world business scenarios.

data.title: Iran Conflict Stalemate Persists as Diplomatic Efforts Unfold
data.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran has reached a 60-day stalemate, with both nations entrenched in a 'no war, no talk' confrontation. According to PANews, Iranian Foreign Minister has initiated a diplomatic campaign, proposing a new step-by-step negotiation plan. The crisis in the Strait of Hormuz continues to impact global energy and economic stability. This article examines the roots of the U.S.-Iran standoff and potential future developments.

data.title: Prediction Market ETFs Set to Launch Next Week
data.description: Prediction market ETFs are expected to officially launch next week, according to ChainCatcher. Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart revealed that Roundhill has submitted the relevant application documents, with the effective date set for May 5. The initial prediction market ETFs will focus on the election outcomes of whether the U.S. Democratic or Republican Party will control the House of Representatives or the Senate.

data.title: Starknet to Launch Privacy Bitcoin Asset strkBTC in May 2026
data.description:
Starknet Foundation's Vice President of Growth, Damian Chen, announced at the 'Bitcoin 2026' conference that the privacy-focused Bitcoin asset, strkBTC, will officially launch on May 12. According to Foresight News, strkBTC is designed to maintain a 1:1 peg with Bitcoin and is governed through a multi-signature approach involving UTXO, Twinsnake, Luganodes, and Xverse, with a third-party asset screening mechanism to prevent prohibited or sanctioned assets from entering the privacy pool.

Once users transfer Bitcoin across chains to Starknet, it enters a privacy pool where all transactions and transfers are completely invisible to external observers. During withdrawal, users can opt to send funds to one or multiple new addresses, with external observers only able to see funds entering the bridge contract and exiting the cross-chain contract, without tracking the intermediate paths. The privacy pool employs cryptographic credential mechanisms, allowing users to hold view keys that decrypt their transaction records, which can be presented to tax authorities or law enforcement for compliance audits.

Chen highlighted that personal attacks on crypto holders increased by 75% in 2025 compared to the previous year, with France experiencing 41 crypto-related kidnapping cases this year. AI tools can now associate on-chain addresses with real identities at a cost of just a few dollars within seconds, achieving 90% accuracy. Current privacy options, such as privacy coins, centralized exchange coin mixing, and mixers, have significant flaws. He stated that strkBTC is currently a trusted wrapped asset, with plans to upgrade to a trustless bridge implemented by BitVM, aiming for native Bitcoin verification on Starknet after completing STARK verification. Additionally, the team is exploring the possibility of making strkBTC resistant to quantum attacks, with specific plans to be announced soon.

data.title: MYX Finance Scheduled to Unlock Tokens on May 6
data.description: MYX Finance is set to unlock approximately 18.06 million tokens on May 6 at 0:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $4.87 million. The unlocking event is part of MYX Finance's ongoing token distribution plan.
